session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete.
**Summary of changes:**
The rename was purely mechanical — no behavioral changes:
**Gateway layer** (`packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/`): - `command_executor/abc.py` + `real.py`: `plan_id`/`plan_url` → `pr_number`/`pr_url`, `close_plan_fn` → `close_pr_fn` - `github/abc.py`: `plan_numbers` → `pr_numbers` in `get_prs_linked_to_issues` and `get_issues_by_numbers_with_pr_linkages` - `github/dry_run.py`: same two methods - `github/real.py`: same two methods + `_build_issue_pr_linkage_query`, `_build_issues_by_numbers_query`; fixed variable name collision (`plan_number`/`pr_number`) by using `issue_number` for the outer loop variable - `github/issues/abc.py` + `dry_run.py` + `real.py`: `plan_number` → `pr_number` in `get_prs_referencing_issue` - `github/metadata/core.py`: 7 functions renamed; YAML key `data["plan_number"]` → `data["pr_number"]` - `github/objective_issues.py`: `CreateObjectiveIssueResult.plan_number` → `pr_number`, 6 constructor calls - `github/parsing.py`: `parse_plan_number_from_url` → `parse_issue_number_from_url`; `construct_issue_url` param `plan_number` → `issue_number`
**Callers** (`src/erk/` + `packages/erk-shared/`): - 8 caller files updated for import renames, keyword arg renames, and field access renames
**Tests** (4 test files updated for the parameter renames that caused failures)
PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9238
